Comments checked on `InitGame`/`EndDMLevel`. `apps/web` reaches map changes through server-backed runtime and `gamemap`; no renderer-three output expected beyond later normal map load. `npm run verify:g-main`, inline cvar/default maplist check, `npm run verify:full-game:rules-transitions`, `npm run typecheck` OK. |

Commentaire d'en-tete verifie. Runtime via `GetGameApi.SpawnEntities`/`SV_SpawnServer`; apps/web via full-game server host; renderer-three consomme les sorties snapshots/configstrings. Tests: `verify:g-main`, `verify:g-spawn`, `quake2-sv-game`, `verify:full-game:server-host`, `verify:full-game:three-renderer`, `verify:web-render-order`, `typecheck`. |

Test cible ajoute dans `scripts/verify/quake2-g-main.ts`; `verify:g-main`, `quake2-sv-user`, `verify:full-game:authoritative-input`, `verify:full-game:three-renderer`, `typecheck` OK. |
| `Quake-2-master/game/g_main.c` | function | `ClientConnect` | `packages/game/src/g_main.ts`<br>`packages/game/src/p_client.ts` | `GetGameApi().ClientConnect` / `ClientConnect` | Partiel | A redecouper | Correction `packages/game/src/g_main.ts`: le slot exporte applique maintenant la politique C par defaut (`SV_FilterPacket`, `password`, `spectator_password`, comptage `maxspectators`) avant delegation a `p_client.ts`, avec hook utilisateur conserve. Test cible ajoute dans `scripts/verify/quake2-g-main.ts`; `verify:g-main`, `quake2-sv-user`, `verify:full-game:server-host`, `verify:full-game:authoritative-input`, `verify:full-game:three-renderer`, `verify:web-render-order`, `typecheck` OK. Reste partiel: le `rejmsg` C mutait `userinfo`, alors que l'ABI TS actuelle passe une string immuable et `packages/server/src/sv_main.ts` ne consomme pas encore la raison de refus. |
| `Quake-2-master/game/g_main.c` | function | `ClientUserinfoChanged` | `packages/game/src/g_main.ts`<br>`packages/game/src/p_client.ts` | `GetGameApi().ClientUserinfoChanged` / `ClientUserinfoChanged` | Valide | A redecouper | Correction `packages/game/src/g_main.ts`: l'export branche maintenant par defaut la configstring `CS_PLAYERSKINS + playernum` via `gi.configstring`; `ClientConnect`/`ClientDisconnect` reutilisent ce hook. Correction `packages/game/src/p_client.ts`: nom absent copie une chaine vide comme le C et `hand` invalide donne `0`. Commentaire d'en-tete verifie dans `p_client.ts`; helper adapter documente dans `g_main.ts`. Runtime via `SV_UserinfoChanged -> ge.ClientUserinfoChanged`; apps/web via full-game server-backed; renderer-three consomme les skins en aval via configstrings/clientinfo, pas de logique directe attendue. Tests: `verify:g-main`, `verify:server:user`, `verify:full-game:server-host`, `verify:full-game:three-renderer`, `verify:web-render-order`, `typecheck` OK; `verify:cl-parse` bloque avant execution utile sur import absent `packages/client/src/parse.js`. |
